name: Assorted Sizzling Rice Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup GREEN BEANS, TRIMMED AND CUT INTO THIN STRIPS
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the shrimp, chicken, egg, and cornstarch. Heat 3 cups of the oil in a wok. When it is hot, add the shrimp and chicken mixture. Cook for 1/2 minute and drain.
2. Place the above mixture into a pot with the broth, mushrooms, water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and green beans. Bring to a boil. Add salt and sherry. Return to a boil. Reduce heat and allow to simmer.
3. Meanwhile, heat the remaining oil until it is hot. Add rice and brown quickly. Drain and add to soup. Serve. By cooking the rice before adding it to the soup, we add a crunchy texture to this savory dish.
